title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: OpenAI Faces Federal Lawsuit Over ChatGPT's Alleged Role in FSU Mass Shooting
summary: The lawsuit alleges ChatGPT provided firearms guidance and tactical advice to the shooter, raising questions about liability for AI firms.

title: Veteran investor bets on Ethereum as AI agents drive tokenization demand
summary: AI agents need “food,” and that food is not physical food; it is tokens, said Jordi Visser.

title: Bank of England chief says global stablecoin rules will ‘wrestle’ with US
summary: Global regulators will have to confront US policy on dollar-backed stablecoins as they seek international standards for payment tokens, Andrew Bailey said.

title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
summary: Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

title: TechCrunch Mobility: Lime’s IPO gamble
summary: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

title: We’re feeling cynical about xAI’s big deal with Anthropic
summary: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we discussed what xAI's deal with Anthropic might mean for parent company SpaceX.

title: Canton Network creator targets $300M in capital raise: Report
summary: Bloomberg reported Digital Asset Holdings is raising money at a $2B valuation in a round led by a16z Crypto, which comes less than a year after an earlier nine-figure round.

title: 3 young DeFi apps return $100M in revenue to token holders in 30 days
summary: Hyperliquid, EdgeX and Pump.fun returned a combined $96 million to token holders in 30 days, as the crypto community shifts its focus from transaction volumes to real earnings.
